features: Energise your skin with our Face Facts Collagen & Q10 Eye Cream to replenish your skin.
Hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant - Its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines.
Packed with skin-loving ingredients like collagen that make your skin soft, smooth and lovely.
Rich Eye cream that glides on and soaks in quickly
description: Energise your skin with this eye cream. The hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant as its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines. With nice ingredients like collagen that make your skin soft, smooth and lovely.
